items.title: Walt Disney, McDonald's, Palantir Set To Report Earnings
items.description: Key earnings this week will include PLTR, ON, AMD, CAT, & PFE. With Trump's revised tariff orders, investors will be keeping an eye on economic reports releasing next week.

items.title: 8 Of My Favourite Dividend Stocks To Survive - And Thrive - In This Market
items.description: Read here for investment strategies for a volatile era. Focus on inflation-resilient sectors like energy and materials while avoiding overhyped stocks.

items.title: Oshkosh (OSK) Q2 EPS Beats by 16%
items.author: Jesterai
items.description: Oshkosh reported Q2 2025 earnings beating estimates with $3.41 EPS, $2.73 billion revenue, and raised full-year guidance to $11.00, despite challenges in Access segment and declining year-over-year revenue.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mixed performance with earnings beat and raised guidance, but declining revenue, sharp Access segment backlog drop, and potential future demand risks
Mentioned in context of expired telehandler agreement, no direct performance details provided
